testimonials.title: Loved by Algerian Merchants
testimonials.subtitle: See what our customers are saying

items.name: Fatima Benali
items.content: Wakil has completely changed how I manage my orders. I now reply to 10x more customers at the same time, while I sleep! My sales increased by 40% in two months.

items.name: Karim Djakoum
items.content: The AI understands Darija and Arabic perfectly. My customers feel respected when the bot replies in their native language. It's incredible for trust and conversions!

items.name: Leila Chabane
items.content: Setup took 3 minutes, no more! No need for a developer or complicated configuration. Just plugged in my Facebook and it was ready. Best investment for my business.
